title: Prakas # 021 on the Collection of Rental Real Estate Tax (Buildings and Vacant Land)_931228
title_en: Prakas # 021 on the Collection of Rental Real Estate Tax (Buildings and Vacant Land)_931228
short_name: Prakas # 021 on the Collection of Rental Real Estate Tax ...

provisions.content:
To collect rental real estate tax on all buildings and vacant land as specifies in Article 26 of the Law on

Finances of 1994.
Shall be exempted from such rental tax collection, any monthly rental income below 500,000 Riels.

An extension of tax payment, a reduction or as the case may be a complete exemption of this rental tax

shall be given to persons experiencing hardships such natural or man-made disasters leading to loss of

property or life.

The Declaration shall enter into force from the date of its signature.

Senior Minister

Minister of Economy and Finances

Signature and Seal

SAM RAINSY
